stemHtml: Which one of the following correctly lists the major ground based components of a Microwave Landing System (MLS)?

options.a: Separate azimuth and elevation transmitters, outer and middle marker beacons
options.b: Separate azimuth and elevation transmitters, DME facility
options.c: Combined azimuth and elevation transmitter, DME facility
options.d: Combined azimuth and elevation transmitter, outer and inner marker beacons
